headline: Should Legal Scrutiny of Gartner’s (IT) Earnings Guidance Framework Require Action From Investors?
summary: In recent weeks, a shareholder law firm began investigating Gartner’s financial disclosures, focusing on whether its earnings guidance and share-count assumptions aligned with internal revenue trends. This scrutiny, combined with analyst caution around Gartner’s 2026 outlook after the Digital Markets divestiture, has intensified questions about the transparency and reliability of its guidance framework. We’ll now examine how this new legal and disclosure scrutiny, particularly around...
